identityOneLiner: Read-only checks at verify time—not color.
heroSubtitle: Declared tool effects vs read-only store facts.
visitorProblemAnswer: Traces say success. Your data often disagrees. Read-only checks at verify time compare tool claims to stored state—before you ship or bill.
heroOutcome: Your agents say the workflow succeeded.
guaranteeFootnote: Read-only checks; not which call wrote.

siteDefaultMetadata.title: AgentSkeptic
siteDefaultMetadata.description: AgentSkeptic compares agent claims with real downstream state — databases, APIs, object stores, and vector stores — and returns a clear verdict.

pageMetadata.title: Traces vs state
pageMetadata.description: AgentSkeptic compares agent claims with real downstream state — databases, APIs, object stores, and vector stores — and returns a clear verdict.

shareableTerminalDemo.title: Bundled terminal proof
shareableTerminalDemo.transcript:
### Success (`wf_complete`)

workflow_id: wf_complete
workflow_status: complete
trust: TRUSTED: Every step matched the database under the configured verification rules.
steps:
  - seq=0 tool=crm.upsert_contact result=Matched the database.

{
  "schemaVersion": 15,
  "workflowId": "wf_complete",
  "status": "complete",
  "steps": [{ "seq": 0, "toolId": "crm.upsert_contact", "status": "verified" }]
}

### Failure (`wf_missing`)

workflow_id: wf_missing
workflow_status: inconsistent
steps:
  - seq=0 tool=crm.upsert_contact result:Expected row is missing from the database (the log implies a write that is not present).
    reference_code: ROW_ABSENT

{
  "schemaVersion": 15,
  "workflowId": "wf_missing",
  "status": "inconsistent",
  "steps": [
    {
      "seq": 0,
      "toolId": "crm.upsert_contact",
      "status": "missing",
      "reasons": [{ "code": "ROW_ABSENT" }]
    }
  ]
}

r2.frameworkMaturity: CrewAI: full support. AutoGen: experimental. Works with any framework that can emit structured activity.

integrate.title: Get started
integrate.description: See the truth behind the green trace — in one command.

pricing.positioning: Catch bad or missing state in CI before it reaches customers, compliance, or revenue.

claim.title: Claim verification run — AgentSkeptic
claim.description: Link a CLI run to an account.

requirements: Read-only access to at least one queryable store (SQL, vectors, S3, Mongo, HTTP, etc.)
Ability to emit or export structured tool activity as NDJSON

mechanism.title: How
mechanism.notObservability: State vs claims; not a full APM or log product.
